name: Chocolate Toffee Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the pecans in the bottom of a buttered 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a heavy saucepan, combine the butter and brown sugar over medium heat.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a boil.
4. Continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a hard crack stage (295°F) on a candy thermometer.
5. Pour the hot mixture evenly over the pecans in the baking pan.
6. Sprinkle with chocolate pieces.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes.
8. Spread melted chocolate evenly over all.
9. When the chocolate is set, break into pieces.
Makes about 3/4 pound.
